subcodes.first_line: O wanderer! Thou hast traversed plain and desert, donned the pilgrim's garb in the path of the Friend, and to the extent possible, returned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آواره من دشت و صحرا پیمودی و احرام کوی دوست بستی و بقدر مقدور رجوع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
